{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320160809FF5F4E78A1513DD95CFC\"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7265977033682305826","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一本好书，详细全面的介绍了元朝的历史，从崛起到灭亡，用词简练，文笔深刻。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691742173,"group_id":"6870066308977806350","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"热爱读书也更热爱生活","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz8GCDPrP0uyGok57KwdoyacMM8JgKeD+I8NCq2qKQNh","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/380542858a3e4e389492355c3401ea62~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776529510\u0026x-signature=GEQjEs8Cgyqea7SvFj109GB4bk8%3D","user_id":"3488112966117728","user_name":"留从效"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3488112966117728","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6870066308977806350","book_info":{"abstract":"元朝，从1271年元世祖忽必烈建立算起，到1368年明太祖朱元璋攻下元大都、元朝末代皇帝元顺帝北逃为止，共计九十七年；若从1206年成吉思汗铁木真建立蒙古帝国开始算起，也不过一百六十二年，相较于之前的唐朝、宋朝和之后的明朝、清朝，毫无疑问，元朝是一个短命的朝代。尽管元朝的统治岁月十分短暂，但是这段历史却是丰富多彩、波澜壮阔的，是漫漫历史长卷中浓墨重彩的一笔。元朝，作为中国历史上一个承上启下的朝代，对中国乃至世界历史都产生过深远的影响。元朝，既不是转瞬即逝的一颗流星，更不是昙花乍现的一隅小国。其辉煌与雄伟的身姿如一头蒙古雄狮，不怒自威。斗转星移，物是人非。是什么导致这样一个曾经屹立于世界之林的帝国轰然崩塌，仅享国不足百年？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/e7831ffd367adf793bd864d3834372f8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"谢国计","author_id":"","book_id":"6870066308977806350","book_name":"不忍细看的元朝史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e8d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.5万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":402,\"name\":\"中国历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402\u0026name=中国历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6870066868518912525","read_count":"641","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"210610"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"10","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/e7831ffd367adf793bd864d3834372f8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779178089\u0026x-signature=HTS0imN4%2FO9CU84CvBNff57QrtU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.3814672e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320160809FF5F4E78A1513DD95CFC\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33814,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1016},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6996289193958195968","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"了解历史，了解以前的中国，是我们现在人都应该做的和必须知道的前事。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1628950517,"group_id":"6870066308977806350","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"宅在家","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz5a6HgRlGH5YOmC2/wXM9E=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"73501483691","user_name":"拥护者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"73501483691","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6870066308977806350","book_info":{"abstract":"元朝，从1271年元世祖忽必烈建立算起，到1368年明太祖朱元璋攻下元大都、元朝末代皇帝元顺帝北逃为止，共计九十七年；若从1206年成吉思汗铁木真建立蒙古帝国开始算起，也不过一百六十二年，相较于之前的唐朝、宋朝和之后的明朝、清朝，毫无疑问，元朝是一个短命的朝代。尽管元朝的统治岁月十分短暂，但是这段历史却是丰富多彩、波澜壮阔的，是漫漫历史长卷中浓墨重彩的一笔。元朝，作为中国历史上一个承上启下的朝代，对中国乃至世界历史都产生过深远的影响。元朝，既不是转瞬即逝的一颗流星，更不是昙花乍现的一隅小国。其辉煌与雄伟的身姿如一头蒙古雄狮，不怒自威。斗转星移，物是人非。是什么导致这样一个曾经屹立于世界之林的帝国轰然崩塌，仅享国不足百年？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/e7831ffd367adf793bd864d3834372f8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"谢国计","author_id":"","book_id":"6870066308977806350","book_name":"不忍细看的元朝史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e8d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.5万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":402,\"name\":\"中国历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402\u0026name=中国历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6870066868518912525","read_count":"641","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"210610"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"10","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/e7831ffd367adf793bd864d3834372f8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779178089\u0026x-signature=HTS0imN4%2FO9CU84CvBNff57QrtU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.4421317e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320160809FF5F4E78A1513DD95CFC\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8544,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":52965,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1686},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374524564225180457","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我刚结婚不久，看了这本《不忍细看的元朝史》，觉得很有意思。特别是看到成吉思汗统一蒙古各部，建立蒙古帝国的那段，真的很佩服他的勇气和智慧。而且这本书内容很丰富，让我对元朝的历史有了更深入的了解。我觉得这本书很值得一读，推荐给你哦！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716667991,"group_id":"6870066308977806350","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6dfHtlq3oOMdmLxftSy3Ec=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"416088296262699","user_name":"喜欢甘谷唢呐的殷明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"416088296262699","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6870066308977806350","book_info":{"abstract":"元朝，从1271年元世祖忽必烈建立算起，到1368年明太祖朱元璋攻下元大都、元朝末代皇帝元顺帝北逃为止，共计九十七年；若从1206年成吉思汗铁木真建立蒙古帝国开始算起，也不过一百六十二年，相较于之前的唐朝、宋朝和之后的明朝、清朝，毫无疑问，元朝是一个短命的朝代。尽管元朝的统治岁月十分短暂，但是这段历史却是丰富多彩、波澜壮阔的，是漫漫历史长卷中浓墨重彩的一笔。元朝，作为中国历史上一个承上启下的朝代，对中国乃至世界历史都产生过深远的影响。元朝，既不是转瞬即逝的一颗流星，更不是昙花乍现的一隅小国。其辉煌与雄伟的身姿如一头蒙古雄狮，不怒自威。斗转星移，物是人非。是什么导致这样一个曾经屹立于世界之林的帝国轰然崩塌，仅享国不足百年？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/e7831ffd367adf793bd864d3834372f8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"谢国计","author_id":"","book_id":"6870066308977806350","book_name":"不忍细看的元朝史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e8d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.5万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":402,\"name\":\"中国历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402\u0026name=中国历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6870066868518912525","read_count":"641","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"210610"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"10","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/e7831ffd367adf793bd864d3834372f8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779178089\u0026x-signature=HTS0imN4%2FO9CU84CvBNff57QrtU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320160809FF5F4E78A1513DD95CFC\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11880,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":293},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"",
